no_regeneration: Stage1 = existing B outputs; only Stage2 discipline filter is new
design: Stage1 skepticism wide generation (recall) -> Stage2 AFE discipline filter (basis-in-frame + decision-relevance + reject irrelevant/over-trigger/unsupported) (precision)

preregistered_interpretation.hybrid_success: hybrid recall ~= B recall(19) AND hybrid problematic ~= D(~0) -> hybrid captures skepticism recall + AFE precision discipline; the tradeoff is resolvable
preregistered_interpretation.over_filter: hybrid recall << B recall(drops target-matches) -> AFE discipline over-filters
preregistered_interpretation.filter_ineffective: hybrid problematic ~= B(7) -> discipline filter fails to remove skepticism noise
